title: Supabase documents table does not exist error
symptom: When attempting to retrieve data from the Supabase vector DB node, n8n throws an error stating 'relation "documents" does not exist'. This prevents any data retrieval despite successful inserts.
applies_when: Attempting to retrieve data from the 'documents' table
not_this_if: The 'documents' table exists and is correctly configured
root_cause: The error occurs when the specified 'documents' table is missing from the Supabase database schema. This can happen if the table was deleted or not created properly during setup.
fix_steps: Check if the 'documents' table exists in your Supabase database.
If it does not exist, recreate the 'documents' table using the langchain template in the SQL Editor.
Verify that the 'match_documents' function is also correctly defined.
agent_instruction: Recreate the 'documents' table in Supabase using the provided SQL template.
safety_notes: Deleting the table will result in data loss if there are existing records.
